title: bulbophyllum elassoglossum
intro: Bulbophyllum elassoglossum, also known as the Elastical Lip Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Papua New Guinea. This plant is used in traditional medicine, where it has been found to have analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum elassoglossum include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, and to treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal applications and safety.
